description_long: This street light features a tall, slender cylindrical pole with a metallic finish, topped by a compact, flat lamp head. The lamp head is circular and appears to have a modern, utilitarian design with a central light source and a flat, disc-like cover. The base of the pole is encased in a yellow cylindrical housing, likely for mounting or protection. The overall structure is minimalistic, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements on the pole. The lamp head is directly attached to the pole without any arms or extensions. The materials suggest durability and weather resistance, suitable for urban outdoor environments.
description: A tall, slim street light with a metallic pole, flat modern lamp head, and a yellow cylindrical base. The design is minimalistic and functional.
description_view_0: Front view shows the straight pole, flat lamp head, and yellow base clearly aligned.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same features, with the pole and lamp head profile visible and the yellow base slightly offset.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the lamp head and base directly in line with the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the pole's profile and the yellow base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, flat, disc-shaped lamp head with a central light source and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
